paper_title: Improving alignment of dialogue agents via targeted human judgements

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces Dialogue-Prompted Chinchilla (DPC) as a baseline dialogue agent by applying a specialized prompt to the Chinchilla-70B model, enabling information-seeking dialogue capabilities. Extends prior work by integrating structured dialogue interactions for better contextual understanding
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Not explicitly named, but built upon Chinchilla-70B pretraining corpus (likely a mix of web/text corpora)
raw_extraction.application: Information-seeking dialogue, question answering, conversational assistants
raw_extraction.research_problem: Aligning dialogue agents for helpfulness, correctness, and harmlessness in information-seeking dialogues
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning with dialogue prompts + targeted human judgments
raw_extraction.extension: Incorporates a custom dialogue prompt template to guide the Chinchilla-70B model toward conversational behavior
raw_extraction.paper_title: Improving alignment of dialogue agents via targeted human judgements

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces Sparrow—a dialogue agent trained via multi-objective RLHF combining targeted human rule judgments and preference-based feedback. Uses evidence retrieval to support factual claims (78% accuracy) and breaks down complex alignment goals into granular rules for precise human evaluation. Combines rule-based adversarial probing with evidence-based correctness checks to enhance robustness and correctness
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Unspecified but likely derived from Chinchilla-70B pretraining corpus
raw_extraction.application: Helpful, correct, and harmless dialogue agents for Q&A, fact-checking, and conversational assistance
raw_extraction.research_problem: Alignment of dialogue agents for helpfulness, correctness, and harmlessness in interactive information-seeking scenarios
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) with targeted human judgments for rule compliance and preference-based optimization
raw_extraction.extension: Uses a modular framework with separate reward models for rule violations and preference scoring, enabling targeted human judgment collection and iterative improvement cycles
raw_extraction.paper_title: Improving alignment of dialogue agents via targeted human judgements
